creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 185002
Update cacti to 1.1.16

Update cacti to 1.1.16 (bug fix release)

Note: ignore portlint errors regarding gettext, cacti has built-in support for gettext so does not require gettext.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.16/


No security updates, so no need for a merge-quarterly this time.
